events.text: Goal!  Korea Republic 0, Algeria 1. Islam Slimani (Algeria) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Carl Medjani.
Goal!  Korea Republic 0, Algeria 2. Rafik Halliche (Algeria) header from very close range to the top left corner. Assisted by Abdelmoumene Djabou with a cross   following a corner.
Goal!  Korea Republic 0, Algeria 3. Abdelmoumene Djabou (Algeria) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Islam Slimani.
Goal!  Korea Republic 1, Algeria 3. Son Heung-Min (Korea Republic) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Ki Sung-Yueng with a through ball.
Lee Yong (Korea Republic) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Korea Republic 1, Algeria 4. Yacine Brahimi (Algeria) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Sofiane Féghouli.
Madjid Bougherra (Algeria) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Han Kook-Young (Korea Republic) is shown the yellow card.
Goal!  Korea Republic 2, Algeria 4. Koo Ja-Cheol (Korea Republic) left footed shot from very close range to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Lee Keun-Ho.
